summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. All five seed PRs remain open and are not safe close candidates under this job: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled; each seed PR needs maintainer/author/proof/technical review rather than backlog cleanup. One linked hydrated PR is security-sensitive and is routed only for central security handling.
